My experience with the team at Searcy Denney Scarola Barnhart & Shipley, P.A. was nothing short of outstanding. From the moment I engaged their services, I was struck by their dedication and commitment to my case. Carter Scott, an excellent attorney, was at the forefront of my legal journey. His depth of knowledge, coupled with his approachable demeanor, made navigating the complexities of my case significantly less daunting. His skill in understanding and anticipating the nuances of the legal landscape was truly impressive.
Angela Barnes and Lazaro Becerra (Laz) were also integral parts of the team. Angela’s meticulous attention to detail ensured that no aspect of my case was overlooked. Her ability to distill complex legal concepts into understandable terms was incredibly reassuring. Laz's strategic thinking and problem-solving prowess were invaluable. He had a unique way of tackling challenges head-on, always finding the best path forward.
What stood out most was their proactive communication. At no point did I feel out of the loop or uncertain about the next steps. They were always available to address my concerns and kept me informed every step of the way. This transparent and open communication style helped build my trust and confidence in their abilities.
The team worked seamlessly together, each bringing their strengths to the table. Their ability to handle complex scenarios effectively was a significant asset. They guided me through the entire process with the utmost professionalism and care, ensuring that I felt supported and understood throughout. Their unwavering dedication and teamwork made all the difference in the outcome of my case.
I highly recommend Searcy Denney Scarola Barnhart & Shipley, P.A. to anyone seeking legal services in personal injury. Their exceptional service, expert knowledge, and compassionate approach make them stand out as a top choice for legal representation.

We were glad to have Brian Denney and his team involved with our case. They were very professional, compassionate and care about their clients. It also was nice to have the clout behind the Searcy Denney name and experience they have  in helping to get a resolution. My wife and I have no hesitation in recommending this law firm. Thank you again !

Very helpful and knowledgeable about our personal injury case. Laz and Angela are very helpful. Couldn’t recommend this law firm more! We are very pleased with our experience. Thank you all so much for representing us.

If I could give more than a 5 star review for Jimmy (James) Gustafson with Searcy Denney Scarola Barnhart and Shipley, I certainly would. Jimmy worked extremely hard from day one on my case.
He is an extremely knowledgeable attorney with incredible experience on all types of cases.
Jimmy made time to personally answer each and every question I had throughout the entirety of my case. If he didn’t know an exact answer (as I asked every question under the moon), he would quickly go out of his way to find the answer for me. I trusted him with bringing justice to my case and he persevered in every way possible to do just that. As my case required filing a claims bill and going through the long and tedious sovereign immunity process, most attorneys in our local area did not have the knowledge to take on my case. Jimmy and his firm, however, were top notch at knowing every aspect of successfully getting my claims bill passed. No amount could ever make up for what I went through and continue to physically and mentally endure from my accident, but I do feel justice was served thanks to Jimmy Gustafson and his firm working diligently on my case from start to finish.

After being involved in an auto accident, I was left dealing with injury recovery and a difficult insurance company. They made the process easy for me which allowed me more time for my recovery and less legal frustration.  Highly Recommend.

I just want to say thank you to Searcy Law for everything they have done for me. And I want to send a special thank you to BONNIE STARK. She was very professional, polite, and helpful. Exceptional service.

We were recently represented by the excellent Searcy law firm regarding a devastating motor vehicle crash in which our vehicle was hit head-on by a tractor-trailer on the interstate. During two-plus years of representation by the firm, we were very impressed by the excellent work ethic, expertise, and dedication of Nydia Serrano, Luana Castro, and Marlen Gomez, who worked tirelessly on our case alongside our attorneys. On the personal side, Nydia, Luana, and Marlen always had time for us and were always respectful of our medical challenges, unending medical appointments, and our journey to get better and get back to our lives. Their personal encouragement meant a great deal to us. Thank you Nydia, Luana, and Marlen.

There are no words to express the gratitude I feel to this firm. They worked together to help ease us through so many obstacles we faced during this difficult time.

reviews.text:
I don’t even know where to start when it comes to thanking Michael Ufferman. Hiring him was the best decision I ever made during the toughest chapter of my life. When I was facing the weight of my conviction, I felt lost and hopeless, but Michael gave me something I hadn’t felt in a long time—hope. From our first meeting, he listened to me like I was family, not just another case. He took the time to really get what I was going through and explained everything in a way that made sense, no matter how complicated the legal stuff got.
Michael’s brilliance as an appellate attorney showed in every step of my appeal. He fought for me with a kind of passion and determination that’s hard to put into words. Thanks to his hard work and incredible knowledge, he got my conviction overturned in the Eleventh Circuit Court of Appeals. I still get emotional thinking about that moment—it gave me my life back. He wasn’t just my lawyer; he was my lifeline, always  there to answer questions and keep me grounded.
What sets Michael apart isn’t just that he’s a top-notch lawyer (though he absolutely is—board-certified and all!). It’s his heart. He treated me with so much kindness and respect, like my future mattered to him personally. If you’re looking for someone to fight for you and truly care, Michael Ufferman is your guy. I owe him everything, and I’ll never stop recommending him. Five stars don’t feel like enough!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Michael. It's our pleasure!

reviews.text:
From David C.:
Most knowledgeable attorney I have come across during this very stressful ordeal. Somehow, when all hope was lost, Mr. Ufferman managed to get my sentence reduced following several unsuccessful appeals by other attorneys. I can now return to my life much sooner and put this tragic mess behind me. He has earned my thanks and respect, and most importantly my trust. He and his staff were extremely attentive, even when my family and I became borderline annoying. Thank you Michael and thank you Audra. For everything.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are happy to help Daniella!

reviews.text: I hired Mr. Ufferman 10 years ago, he brought me through a juvenile resentencing where due to his unparalleled skill my sentence was reduced from a natural life sentence to the minimum term of 40 years. He was so good that the Honorable Judge Howard even commented at the end of my hearing that he wasglad that other younger attorneys were present to watch how an appeal should be conducted at its highest level. He was always present for me when I had questions or even doubts. He fought for me, not just doing the required legal work but he actually fought until he saw me released from prison on July 26th, 2024 where on that day he and Audra Bryan walked me from imprisonment. No other attorney in my 26 years of fighting in the courts has ever demonstrated the tenacity or intellectual capacity of Michael Ufferman. I would not be free today without him.  He is more than just an exceptional attorney, he is an exceptional person whom I respect as a lawyer and as a man.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. It's our pleasure.

reviews.text: The old joke goes, "99% of Attorneys make the other 1% look BAD!" Well, Michael Ufferman is absolutely in that "1%". My name is Jeremy Brown and I retained Michael Ufferman and his firm to represent me in my appeal of a false Federal Conviction. Having worked with numerous other attorneys over the course of 19 months, I had been disappointed at nearly every turn, but working with Michael and his staff was a breath of fresh air. Michael gave me the sense that, not only did he care about the outcome of my appeal, but that he actually cared about me personally. Our meetings were open discussions about not just the letter of the law, but also legal theories, philosophy and intent, as a team, not an "I'm an attorney and this is the way it is" ego session. Michael's knowledge, professionalism and ability to explain complex legal scenarios meant the world to me and provided a level of comfort and confidence that's priceless when your waiting has to take place in a jail cell. But as important as all that was, nothing was more important than the fact that WE WON and I write this review as a FREE MAN! If I could, I'd give him 50 stars! My gratitude for Michael Ufferman and his Team can never be captured in words. He easily gets my highest recommendation and deepest respect. Thank you Michael and Team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so, so much!

reviews.text: First, may I say: I will never have the words or the time/space here to properly express my gratitude for Mr. Ufferman and his staff. Never. Mr. Ufferman's zeal, attention to detail, knowledge of and application of the law, GENUINE care and concern, communications, and pure love for helping people... are beyond amazing! We have personally witnessed his mind working during court hearings; you can SEE him seize onto an idea or response and he's steps AHEAD of the opposition. He doesn't "spray & pray": he targets points from every angle, explains them, and presents them with a confidence and passion I've not seen. My 40-month ordeal (20 mos with Ufferman Law) with lies and injustices from the start, had me hopeless and my family suffering DAILY. Mr. Ufferman's efforts provided me a vacated sentence and new trial ordered. And, he's not alone: His hand-picked staff exude their own care, concern and professionalism. I firmly and confidently recommend no other: THIS appellate attorney and THIS legal staff gave us Hope, Strength, and outstanding effort and results.

reviews.text: What can I say about this man except that he is the most amazing appeal attorney in the state of Florida. For those reading this just know, I post this a year and a half after getting convicted of 35 years in prison. Ufferman got me home quickly and is helping me stay home! This man believes in justice and fights hard for his clients. I would not recommend anyone else for your appeal. He also keeps in constant contact with you every step along the way. He will not leave you not knowing. Always there to answer your questions. Don't look any further, you found the best if you are reading this review right now. Thanks Ufferman for all you have done for me and God Bless!
reviews.ownerResponse: Happy to help you Paul

reviews.text: Michael Ufferman has done an amazing job for Paul and believes in us and fought for justice and He knows what to do and how to do it. The Staff are very helpful and always their to assist when you needed. We are very thankful for Mr. Ufferman.

reviews.text: Mr. Ufferman fought hard for me and treated me like a human being. The staff is very helpful and quick to get back to you. He is a real professional and would recommend him for any legal needs you may have.

reviews.text: We all grow up believing that Justice always prevails, that it's somehow finds its way! That in the United States of America the Constitution is followed. Well I learned the hard way that is not always the case! For the last 3 years my son has gone through nothing short of a living hell! A vengeful jealous woman can make your life unbearable! My son was sentenced to 25 years in prison with no possibility of parole. An innocent young man with no prior convictions! I don't remember  how  I stumbled upon Michael ufferman, but I will say it was only by the grace of God! Michael is articulate, extremely thorough and definitely knows his job! If you are ever looking for an excellent appellate attorney in the state of Florida, contact Michael and you can rest easy to know that he will do everything possible to have the results of your case overturned! My entire families life was turned upside down, for over three years, three long horrific years, but now my son is home. I can actually hold and hug him again! I've smiled and laughed enough in the past week to make up for the three years of fear, grief and terror!  Praise God and thank you Michael and your team!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Darlene!

reviews.text: Mr Ufferman was amazing from start to finish. He made my husband and I feel very comfortable and confident we had the right law firm to protect us.  He was well prepared and versed to support our position during the appellate phase of my case. We are so grateful we found Michael Ufferman to help us.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Angela!

reviews.text:
My experience with this firm, is that they work with insurance companies instead of their own clients. My case has been stalled for over a year with no reason.  I have asked over & over for status and/or asked for next step procedure with no reply.  I have tried to hire a different law firm & I can’t because of the stage of the case & contract that was signed.

My mistake was not researching law firm’s. If an EMT in the back of an ambulance give you a business card after you just been in a life changing accident with “Moye Law Firm” name on it, throw it away...

Please do yourself a favor and research law firms before deciding because it will be a life changing decision!  I am stuck with this law firm office how ever it ends. The way I have been treated is worse then the actual accident it self....

(Update to my initial review 6/16)
Seven - Eight weeks back, I kept calling and wanted to speak about my case... David Moye would not call me or reply to my emails.  I then got a call back from Tracy Moye wanting to be caught up on the case.  I had to review 18 months of what was said to Mr. Moye and Justin, his power legal (that left them after passing the bar exam.. good for him)  I emailed a detailed time frame of events to get Ms. Moye caught up.. Felt good with the initial conversation thinking "things are getting done now". I was wrong again, call after call, email after email with no response.  Today I spoke to Tracy Moye, only to be told I was dropped weeks ago because of my review, with a certified letter that I never received because the Moye Law firm never updated my contact information when I gave it to them in email form in January 2020...

How can a law firm of 20+ years of service only have 3 review? And with two of them being one star or less.... It should make you go, hmmmm

(Update on initial review 2/5)
How many different google business accounts does this firm have? I will keep updating my review and won't delete it until I get a letter of release so I can go to a real law firm..

And the few review on here are false! Why aren't they with "Moye Law Firm" google business page, that has it as a 2.3 star rating?
David is always readily available, empathetic, knowledgeable and detailed oriented. Extremely friendly and pleasant to have on your side!

Not just bodycam footage but even medical records. I'm a victim of a false police report given by the very people who caused my injuries and apparently not even Ben Crump is here to help me. reviews.text:
Based on my personal knowledge and first-hand accounts from people directly involved, I have serious concerns about Twyla’s involvement in elder and guardianship matters. What I know reflects poor judgment, lack of empathy, and a disturbing disregard for the harm guardianship can cause to vulnerable seniors and their families.

This is a clear warning: if you are dealing with elder care or incapacity issues, avoid guardianship if at all possible and get independent advice first. Based on what I know, this is not someone I would trust with decisions affecting a senior’s rights or wellbeing.

Sketchley Law Firm was brought onto my case at the last minute but they worked tirelessly to address the issues. They were quick to reply to my many inquiries and walked me through many difficult days. I am thankful I found them when I did and highly recommend them.

reviews.text: Paid $425 for a 22 minute consultation. Had to wait 6 weeks for a simple piece of advice and in need of a quick claim deed. When I questioned the quote in writing with a miscalculation in the agreement I received a letter informing me that they would not handle my case. I called another firm and in one day got help and the proper result for $177.70. Sketchley was slow because she took the entire month of October off. Her office run by Tazara was rude and the quote had bad math. Best case scenario, I would have paid $1000 for a $177 issue.  I have all this in writing and documented. I felt her rates were excessive,slow to respond, and she has lighted me to pad the bill unnecessarily.
reviews.ownerResponse: The firm received your review, it is constrained by the Rules Regulating The Florida Bar from responding in detail, but we will simply state that it is the firm's belief that your comments present neither a fair nor accurate picture of what occurred and we believe your post is false. reviews.text: If you want to be treated with courtesy, respect and professionalism, DO NOT hire this law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
You never hired me, met me, or spoke with me; you certainly never hired me.
You called my office twice (March 1 and March 8) while I was in a two week trial. I never contacted you, I admit that, but I have to focus on my current clients and if that means not returning prospective client phone calls (like yours) that is what the Florida Bar requires me to do. I never had the opportunity to treat you with courtesy, respect, or professionalism, because I was stuck in a murder trial. In a perfect world I would be able to, but when you called me on March 1, and March 8, I was unable to call you back.
It is with profound shock that someone like you would imply that you hired me and I treated you without courtesy, respect, or professionalism.
I am pretty sure that is what a lot of people call a lie; because you never hired me or ever said a single word to me.
Imagine if the shoe were on the other foot and someone called you and didn't communicate with them, would anyone say that you treated that person in a discourteous manner, without respect, or professionalism? Of course not, they would say Dianne must've been really busy. The main point is that your review is implying that you hired me, which is a lie, and then I disrepected you, which is impossible if I never contacted you.
Please leave your review up, I think it is an excellent case study in how to slander someone.

reviews.text:
Reviewers, please note, this review may change once I get full details and a thorough understanding.

Hello, I am Mr J Y Williams. My son, David allowed me to use his google account. Mr Pelham is a money grabber to his clients. My daughter/stepdaughter nicknamed Deila had a claim and it was carried on up to 9 years. Her mother passed and since I had adopted her at birth and my name was on her case as a contact individual, I was left to handle her case since she is a juvenile. Last year around November, I contacted Mr Pelham and I was told I couldn’t talk with him to personally situations of Mr Pelham that I will not reveal.
Recently I got a chance to talk with Pelham and was told that he can’t deal with my daughter case anymore because I spoke with the insurance company in which he is or was filing the law suit with. I never spoke with no insurance company. No insurance company never tried to get in contact with me although I knew not to answer the phone.
Mr Pelham, I do think you as many do “cashed out” but I am in the process of looking into this matter.
My deceased wife and I trusted you with our daughter case and you failed us. You were a great attorney from the start. You met with us, you spoke with us as a good attorney should but you failed us with no further information nor communication.
I will pray for you because money struck is not good when you take advantage of clients. Lawyers are suppose to help their clients not make their suffering harder. My daughter because of her injuries are now handicap. Confined to a wheelchair because of a Dump Truck Company accident at a bus stop. People who do wrong such as you give people bad names. I do pray I am wrong and that the details was given to me wrongful but if it is, please do contact me and I will update my information.
reviews.ownerResponse: After reading this review, I thoroughly investigated the allegations.  I could not find any such case that fit the fact pattern described.  Other allegations are blatantly false.  Perhaps, Mr. Williams has me confused with another attorney.  My policy is that clients can always schedule an appointment to speak with me.  My staff knows that is the Golden Rule at my firm.  So the allegation that my staff would not allow Mr. Williams to speak to me is false.  I have had numerous clients that have spoken to the insurance company before hiring me and even after hiring me.  I do not refuse a case and withdraw from a case for that reason.  I advise the client that it is not wise to speak with the insurance company without their attorney present.  So, that allegation is false.  Mr. Williams said that if he is wrong, to contact him.  Unfortunately, I have no way of contacting him.  However, if Mr. Williams would like to speak with me either by phone or in person, I encourage him to call my office at 850-383-6600.  I would be happy to speak with him.

reviews.text: I had never sought out representation in my life until going through a bad car accident a while back. From the very first step, Paige VanLare and James Messer took care of EVERYTHING. They took everything out of our hands, and as our busy lives resumed, we never had to worry that we weren’t in good hands. They are absolutely the people to go to. You can trust them to get the job done well, and you won’t spend countless hours explaining and re-explaining your case. Look no further!
Mr. McConnaughhay and Ms. Spahr were amazing, detailed, and transparent throughout my time with them. Definitely recommend them! They are all an awesome team.

Fortunately this is the first time I have ever needed a personal injury attorney, but before I went to Fonville I asked several other attorneys that I have known since law school who they would use if they were injured in a car accident that was not their fault, and the Fonville firm was frequently recommended.  And now I can recommend them too.
Andrei Antohi and his staff did a great job with my case and not only got a much larger final settlement than I hoped for, they kept me involved in the process and up to date on the progress of the case. As a bonus he even pointed out that I probably need to increase my uninsured motorist coverage.  I definitely will go back to Andrei and Fonville if I need a personal injury attorney again.

I was very happy to have them in my corner. Heather and Allen were extremely helpful throughout the entire process. They were easy to get in touch with and took the time to explain everything clearly. I’m very happy with the outcome and truly grateful for their support, an amazing team to work with!!

reviews.text:
Andrei Antohi is our family lawyer. He helped my daughter when she was injured by an uninsured at fault driver. Years ago, he helped her mother win a major settlement after she tore her shoulder and the at fault party’s insurance company wouldn’t pay for her treatment. I had a life-altering injury a few years ago, and Andrei won a life-changing settlement. He was so well prepared that the opposing parties settled in one negotiation. Andrei then went on to settle a hospital lien against me for a fraction of its worth.

Andrei has gifts that don’t easily fit on his firms’ masthead. When he sensed that I had questions, or that he suspected I may not understand something, he would pick up the phone and call me, unprompted. Andrei's experience has taught him to anticipate questions and concerns and read when the client gets what he’s telling them. He takes the time to meet human needs. He’s personable, funny, and a father who can relate to other parents and their concerns. I hope my family isn’t injured and have need of an attorney again, but he will be the first person we seek out if we do.

Andrei is a fine man and an excellent lawyer, but Connie Martin is the bees’ knees at this law firm. She is the front face and first contact for many of Andrei’s clients. He couldn’t have a better one! Connie can also anticipate questions and answer most, but she’s organized, reassuring, and compassionate for people who could use some kindness and compassion. Our family highly recommends Andrei and Connie!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Ken!  We appreciate your kind words.

reviews.text: There is no language that is sufficient to get anyone to understand how wonderful I feel about Fonvielle, Lewis, Messer & McConnaughhay, but I'll try. My personal attorney, Mr. Jim Messer, has tried so hard to help me and I am VERY happy with him. This world is so full of so many terrible jeopardies and that's why you need a great attorney in your corner, one with DECADES of experience, someone who knows people, someone who understands how the system really works, someone who is constantly educating themself on the latest legal system rules and legislation, and most of all someone like Mr. Messer who actually cares about you. One of the most important points is understanding that it doesn't cost anything to just go talk to them to see if they can help you, and you don't give up any money if they can't get you any money. I'll never hesitate to contact this great man to seek his sage advice and protection against the terrible things that happen in this world. Great job, Jim! Thank you! (Photo:  t-boned my driver's door and rolled me over. Permanent neck, back and rib injuries)

reviews.text:
My experience with this firm, is that they work with insurance companies instead of their own clients. My case has been stalled for over a year with no reason.  I have asked over & over for status and/or asked for next step procedure with no reply.  I have tried to hire a different law firm & I can’t because of the stage of the case & contract that was signed.

My mistake was not researching law firm’s. If an EMT in the back of an ambulance give you a business card after you just been in a life changing accident with “Moye Law Firm” name on it, throw it away...

Please do yourself a favor and research law firms before deciding because it will be a life changing decision!  I am stuck with this law firm office how ever it ends. The way I have been treated is worse then the actual accident it self....

(Update to my initial review 6/16)
Seven - Eight weeks back, I kept calling and wanted to speak about my case... David Moye would not call me or reply to my emails.  I then got a call back from Tracy Moye wanting to be caught up on the case.  I had to review 18 months of what was said to Mr. Moye and Justin, his power legal (that left them after passing the bar exam.. good for him)  I emailed a detailed time frame of events to get Ms. Moye caught up.. Felt good with the initial conversation thinking "things are getting done now". I was wrong again, call after call, email after email with no response.  Today I spoke to Tracy Moye, only to be told I was dropped weeks ago because of my review, with a certified letter that I never received because the Moye Law firm never updated my contact information when I gave it to them in email form in January 2020...

How can a law firm of 20+ years of service only have 3 review? And with two of them being one star or less.... It should make you go, hmmmm

(Update to my initial review 2/5)
Moye Law Firm is trying to have a new Google Business Page as "David Moye Law Firm" a  ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ rating from three months of clients. I will keep updating my dealings with this firm until I get my letter of release so I can go to a real firm.
Tracy and David are professional, caring, and excellent attorneys.  They have done an excellent job on the cases they have handled for me and I would recommend them!

I had a property line dispute with a neighbor and although I tried to be cooperative, he ended up suing me.  Not a pleasent feeling to be served papers while you're out cutting the lawn.  Anyway, I called the Moyes and I met with David; he took a lot of time and explained everything to me so I could understand all my options. It took a lot of back and forth with the neighbor and his lawyer but it was resolved in my favor.  Woo-hoo, good to get that off my back.  I hope I never get sued again but if I am I'll call the Moyes again.  I highly recommend them.

As a small business owner of a growing company I must have an excellent team to ensure all aspects of the business are operating soundly. The Moye Law Firm is an essential team member to our business operation, AMWAT Moving Warehousing Storage. We rely on David Moye and Tracy Moye to assist us with diverse issues and challenges many small businesses encounter. David Moye and Tracy Moye have always handled everyone of our concerns in the most professional manner by listening and clearly communicating with us in a manner we can understand so we can make educated and informed decisions. They are objective and ethical; they always have our best interest at heart. Most importantly, we trust them. We are fortunate to have such a great team of legal professionals representing us. We highly recommend the Moye Law Firm.
Please please avoid this law office at all cost all they care about is taking your money instead of helping you they are  horrible help you Would be better off representing yourself in a civil case

I love the Moyes!!!
Great lawyers.
Awesome people.

I would like to express my deepest appreciation and respect for Matthew Williams and the exceptional work he put into helping me. His dedication, determination, and willingness to go the extra mile were evident from the very beginning. Throughout this entire process, he remained focused, driven, and committed to securing the best possible outcome for us. In trial, Matthew was phenomenal. His attention to detail, his command of the facts, and his refusal to back down spoke volumes about his professionalism and integrity. He demonstrated a clear and intelligent understanding of the law, and he fought for us with unwavering strength. Hearing that someone could be facing 30+ years or even a minimum of 13½ and then walking away with only a couple years is a testament to his skill and commitment. Every case is different, and everyone’s scorecard varies, but if you’re looking for someone who is honest, intelligent, and truly willing to fight for your rights and freedom, Matthew Williams is the attorney you want on your side. He may not call or update you every week, but that does not mean he isn’t working tirelessly behind the scenes. His actions speak louder than any phone call ever could. I also want to extend my sincere gratitude to Jalisa, his paralegal. She was incredibly helpful throughout this entire process. She answered every question I had with patience and clarity, which brought me so much peace during a very stressful time. I know she was tired of me calling 😂 but she still assisted me. I genuinely consider both Matthew and Jalisa like family now.I could never thank them enough for guiding us through such a difficult chapter in our lives. I highly recommend The Law office of Matthew C. Williams PLLC

One Of The Most Prominent & Professional Attorneys I’ve Come By In The Last 10 Years.  Matt Has The Attentiveness Of A Lion & Not To Mention The Aggressiveness of One As Well, The Way He Attacks A Case, One Would Think He’s upset With The Prosecutor.

For ALL your attorney needs PLEASE reach out and give Matt your business a TRUSTWORTHY and HONEST young man. 🙏🏿
Matt really went to bat for my people . He fought hard in a trial that a lot of people would think the odds were against them and he WON ! So grateful & 100% would recommend .

Mr. Locurto was our attorney against an awful construction company. They took a very large deposit. As hurricane survivors we had to battle our home insurance, but by the time that case was resolved, the construction company quit. That was our good fortune. Construction company #2 was aghast at what was done---was never inspected, everything against code, etc. Company #1 refused to return any money. With skillful negotiations, Mr. Locurto was able to show them the error of their ways and why we'd prevail if we ever took them to court. They settled without us having to file. This took months, but Mr. Locurto never let up standing up for us and pushing. He kept us informed of our costs and worked very hard to keep our out of pocket at a minimum. And yes, we went into this furious, and he tempered our riteousness with logic. We were updated at every step and cc'd on all correspondence, so there was always the feeling of working as a team. He fights hard the entire time, and we really felt that we'd found the absolute best lawyer for the situation.

Hands down the best lawyer in town. Mr. LoCurto helped me through one of the worst episodes of my life after I was defrauded by individuals who were supposed to be looking out for me. As a fellow elder law attorney, I know the unique combination of expertise in a tricky area of law and compassion needed to serve clients in this area of law.

Beth Maykut has it. She has mastered the areas of wills, trusts, Medicaid, and estate administration, and connects with people on a deep level.

This is a special area of law where it is important to pick a compassionate expert. I recommend Beth Maykut for this reason.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Meridee! We appreciate the thoughtful words and feedback and look forward to working with you and your clients again soon.

reviews.text: I had reached out to just about every elder law firm in Tallahassee for help setting up my grandfather’s estate after he had a health emergency. 3 of them never called me back, one told me the next opening was months away, and one led me on for months telling me the attorney was almost ready to take my case, before finally admitting the next opening was also months away. I spent months worrying about what we would do, tearing my hair out and agonizing over what felt like a hopeless situation. Ms. Maykut with King & Wood was the only attorney to immediately spring into action and help us during this extremely difficult time. Within a week, Ms. Maykut handled my grandpa’s entire estate, met him in the hospital and solved all our problems for a good price. I cannot possibly thank her and her office enough. They were friendly, communicative, understanding, and prompt. I can say with absolutely no reservations that we, as a family, would have been financially ruined were it not for her coming to our rescue in this dire situation. Thank you Ms. Maykut!

The initial closing date was changed which caused things to be rush.  Mistakes on initial paperwork (for ex. misspellings, amounts incorrect, etc) were made due to the date of closing being moved up. reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Aman,  we appreciate your feedback and are sorry your initial encounter with our firm was disappointing.  Calls from potential new clients are very important to us.  Our intake process, like that of many law firms, is designed to allow us to check for conflicts of interest, determine whether the matter is within the scope of our practice, and determine whether we would have present capacity to help the caller with the matter.  That process is as good for the caller as it is for our firm, as it saves time and resources for both in the event we should be unable to provide advice or representation to the caller in connection with the matter.  We obviously can't allow nonlawyers on our staff to answer substantive questions or otherwise provide legal advice.  Based upon the information you provide above, our receptionist handled the call in the manner our intake process requires.  I hope this response is of some help.  Kim  King.

Top notch attorney who works diligently and fights hard for his clients. Mr Jansen is an honest, reliable man willing to do the work in order to obtain outstanding results! Well pleased and very highly recommended.

First Impressions are lasting impressions! A+++ Service. Attorney Davis is awesome and I will debate publicly anyone who disagrees. Be mindful, that I never lose arguments. Attorney Davis was honest with us and did not sugar coat anything. He was absolutely correct that my child needs to find new friends. Attorney Davis listened to me and understood this was a severe stressor for me. He never left me waiting. He responded to my emails promptly. We are very satisfied and highly recommend him. It was unfortunate that we needed him, but were we glad he took the call and showed up.

First of all, I don’t know “Mr Jansen’s” first name because he introduces himself to other adults as Mr. Jansen. Weird. Secondly, he told my sister and I we were the reason our father committed suicide in jail because we inquired about the retainer. He met my dad on Wednesday and he died in the wee hours of Friday morning. So, “Mr. Jansen” does not care about ethical standing when entering an agreement when representing someone that is not competent. The Florida Bar may have another view point outside of “Mr Jansen.” My message here is be aware of entering an agreement with “Mr Jansen” because he doesn’t even want to discuss returning a retainer within scope of his OWN agreement.
Best lawyers around hands down. You’re gonna get your money’s worth here. Very nice people.
Jansen failed to show up to the hearing. Extremely unprofessional!

BEWARE USING THIS FIRM!!! A dear friend trusted these people 20 YEARS AGO!! She didn’t understand anything about the laws or such. She was accused of something she didn’t do and the lawyer at the firm told her it was best to plead NO CONTEST. She didn’t understand at that time he was just taking her money but he knew the offense would stay on her record forever as a FELONY!!! She is a medical professional and if she had known this she would have ran to another attorney who would have been willing to work for her and not just take her money. She found out YEARS later when she applied for jobs and would get denied. Why did she pay all the money and do what they wanted if it was still going to be a felony? She probably would have came out better just letting them haul her away to jail even though she had done nothing wrong! But she was melanin…guess that’s why she got that treatment. RUN unless you still want to be paying for it 20 or 30 years later! They didn’t try to do what was in her best interest at all. They could have gotten charges dropped or reduced.

Good morning Consumer World!

I have to say this is the best probate law firm in town! My mom passed away last year and I was basically forced to sell her home due to a  reverse mortgage not being reasonable. This was such a quick fix but a stressful time for me. The home is in Apalachicola Florida, a smaller town with limited resources and "busy" attorneys. It felt as though no one could take my case. We were in crunch time with only a few weeks from foreclosure proceedings so my deadline was July 9-13th.

I made a call to an attorney and he was retired but referred me to St. George Island. I spoke to a gentleman that stated he didn't do probates but referred me to Stephanie Galloway at Manausa, Shaw, & Minacci in Tallahassee stating it was their sister company. I was losing hope and gave her a call. Our phone call was quick, productive, and efficient. She sounded confident we could do this in the time frame we needed but of course couldn't make any promises. Literally, we scraped up the money needed, overnighted it her, signed all documents, and she had it to the judge in a week! I was so impressed, I couldn't believe it! Next thing you know the judge signed off in 1 day and house is updated in me and my brother's name. I was almost in tears it was a bitter-sweet time but God put her in my path to get everything taken care of. Foreclosure was for July 13th, we closed the house of July 11th.  Now tell me if that's not top-notch service there!

I apologize for the long review but this was something that needed to be said. After we closed on the home, it seemed like everybody wanted their contact information from attorneys, title companies, and my realtor so hopefully we got you more business! LOL  Don't take my word for it, if you ever need legal guidance, go to Manusa, Shaw, & Minacci, PA. Thank you again Stephanie!

reviews.text: Friends and family have all closed on their homes here, myself included. Extremely professional and easy to work with. Answered all the questions I had about closing documents, and didn't rush through the process. If you're looking to buy/close on a home in Tallahassee, this is the place!

Danny Manausa has handled all of my Real Estate legal work in the Tallahassee area for many years. I fully trust Danny and his team to always take care of any issue that may arise during a closing. I send all of my family and friends to Danny, including my own Mother, for anything involving real estate, trust or estate work. I have known Danny for over 36 years both personally and professionally and can say that he is of the highest moral character and his work ethic and abilities are second to none.
No better property attorney in town. Danny, Kyle and the whole staff are beyond professional. Buying or selling property in Tallahassee, here is your best bet.

About five months after closing, I am getting correspondence from HUD saying a debt is owed on the same property. Manausa did not do their due diligence.

I contacted Manausa and was relayed to Kyle Shaw to discuss the HUD situation. Kyle Shaw of Manausa communicated to me he would work to resolve the matter; two months later communication from him became almost nonexistent. The HUD is placing a lien on the home that is now owned by someone other than me. Manausa has not resolve this situation as of this day.

The closing included title search and title insurance. This situation should have been resolved by use of title insurance or Manausa paying for their mistake. A lot of money was paid during this closing to make sure there was proper change of ownership. Now they are trying to push a regular working family to come up with thousands of dollars to resolve an overlooked problem on their part. I received  an email from Kyle Shaw saying they assumed some things concerning my mortgage pay off. That is not very professional if you are getting paid to do correct legal and accountable work.

I waited a while before posting this because I thought Manausa was a trustworthy company to do things properly. Now I see I was wrong. I suggest you get another title company to do your closing...You live and you learn.

Beware!!! when closing with this company if you buy a home you may not totally own the home.

We close many of our real estate sales contracts at the Manausa Law Firm every week. Their attention to detail, knowledge, and expertise are second to none. It's great closing on a home sale with seasoned attorney's who know how to solve the problems that often arise when selling or buying a home.
Have utilized Danny Manausa's legal services in several transactions - would highly recommend!

Disability rights Florida is a joke and a waste of taxpayer money thy are supposed to be a organization that helps and protects people suffering from disabilities however this is far from the truth over the past three years I’ve had a open case with them despite this there was nothing done about my issue with APD ( agency for persons with disabilities) despite years of emails showing my complaint and wrongful negligence imposed by the agency also the agency investigator himself seen the  issues the agency cases despite this the agency gets away with what they do my future for getting waiver services is not certain and disability rights isn’t doing nothing

Failure to legal advocacy or accommodations for several court cases involving the publisher of this review. Discriminatory practice. Falsifying information via telephone about acceptable cases that qualified for advocacy that were clearly posted on their website.
Now I understand the bad reviews, whoever responded my email after filling out the intake is extremely rude, is true they are trash.
I'd give them no stars if I could. Person on the line was incredibly rude. I expect better from staff who care about our most vulnerable.

Amazing device and support. Phone call on one day telling me about your Services. The next day, I got a call from a sister organization, and less than a week later, I was in an adjustment to blindness course, and they even picked me up at my home and drove 45 minutes away to the class seven times.
They also set me up for another course on October 1st, which is a weekly course on Wednesdays.
Everyone at the courses was extremely nice and understanding.
Dave Kaiset
Crystal Rover, Fla.Everyone at the courses was extremely nice and understanding.

Arthur was amazing he truly worked with me and helped me tremendously! He was extremely dedicated and devoted to helping me and my situation. I truly appreciate him and all his work and I’m more than satisfied with the Disability Rights Florida organization. I am also extremely grateful for the outcome I received. this organization is truly here to help advocate for individuals and I admire that!

I have worked with Disability Rights for assistance in managing benefits that my adult son is entitled to because of his significant disabilities. There is a waitlist. This is no simple task in Florida, however, by following the specific advice provided by the professionals in this organization, I was able to acheive the desired outcome. This required TIME, patience, persistance and the ability to provide accurate documented information. You must understand the process and follow the process. There are no SHORTCUTS. Thank you!, Disability Rights Florida.

There has been a big change since 2019, Disability Rights Florida forgot who they worked for. Disability Rights Florida was once known for its strong advocacy and unwavering commitment to protecting the rights of individuals with disabilities. The organization plays a crucial role in fighting for accessibility, inclusion, and equal opportunities across the state.  However, they no longer return calls. You can call them and fill out the application, but no one returns your call. You can send them emails to follow up and no one returns the emails.  This lack of communication has left many individuals feeling unsupported and frustrated. It is crucial for organizations like Disability Rights Florida to prioritize responsiveness and accountability to effectively serve the needs of the community they are meant to assist.

This place is trash. They say they help for free, but what you get is people that have no idea how to do their jobs... First it months for them to respond. The first "advocate" Jennifer Coburn said on the phone that there were so many violations then 2 days later said there isnt.  Her bosses disagreed with her, got transferred to an ruder person who basically told be something totally different. Then they dropped the case and now because of there incompetence I may not be able to sue the district. DO NOT USE THESE PEOPLE!!!!!!!
Thank you very much for the crucial service provided to our family and the work you do for people  with disabilities.

My son could not have had better advocate fight on his behalf, Ms. Alvarez was so incredible and knowledgeable, everything she did was always in the best interest of my son. We had several meetings with his school and her integrity and professionalism with school staff, my son and myself, was nothing less than exemplary. Her hard work is greatly appreciated, there are no words to express our gratitude. My son is on his way to being successful, with the accommodations that has been put in place to help him achieve those successes, because of her insistence, persistence and unwavering determination to ensure that he received the accommodations tailor made for his educational needs. We are eternally grateful to this organization and the amazing work it has provided for my son.

Thank you very much Florida disability right, Thank to Mrs. Coburn for helping me step by step so i can decide which is best for my disability son. Jennifer work hard even at night or weekends do a research and called to clarify some information to be sure which  way to help me. Thank very much FDR, Thank Mrs.Coburn

I have absolutely no words to describe how thankful I am to them, specially to Selina! She is an angel in our lives! We needed their help twice in two years and they were there for my child, always! In every meeting, every email, always getting out of their way to help no matter the time I would send emails! Selina has put all her heart into helping my child. I will never ever ever be able to pay it back, and will never find enough words to express how grateful I am for having her in our lives when we needed the most!
Thank you, guys! Thank you for not giving up on my child even when the fight got stressful! Thank you, Selina, for speaking up on behalf of my child and making sure his rights and needs were respected and attended. You guys are incredibly great! ❤️
They are so helpful and they care !!!!
Doesn't help students with disabilities stear clear. Was told by one of their attorneys that my kid doesn't need to know how to read since 67 percent of children in Florida can't read on grade level.

So far so good. I am in the midst of fighting issues with people who think they can decide if I am disabled or not and they are gonna see how they can help me deal with theses issues

Okay so it’s been almost two years and I have gotten no help to resolve my issues with Camp Inn and the judgement on me and my accommodation dogs (esa).

So when pushed for resolve, they just denied my claim and so my landlord (corporate office) took that as an opportunity to try and evict us again after two years with no issues. Now I have to go to a hearing and good lord finding an attorney is NOT an easy task. NO ONE WILL HELP THAT I HAVE CALLED!!! They don't have time or they don't take cases like mine. Either way, I am doing this. They cannot do this to me!
They don’t help at all and don’t give you any information and/or what is needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Glen - We're sorry if we are unable to assist you. Disability Rights Florida is a nonprofit organization that has limited funds and staff positions which presents challenges. In addition, we are limited to specific areas of practice. We appreciate your understanding and wish you the best in finding the support you need.

Disability Rights Florida states that they works to protect and advocate for the rights of people with disabilities. Please explain to me, why aren’t they honoring their own statement? Their "actions" send a conflicting message to the disabled individual(s) that they are supposed to "protect and advocate for the rights of people with disabilities". You can tell by a business "actions" if they really hold up to their own message/statement. . I was super excited when I discovered them. I filled out their “Request Assistance” form on their internet webpage. I waited for 3 days and there was no answer back to me. So I decided to go to their office and ask them when will I receive a response from them. The representative at the front desk said someone will make contact with me. It has been over 3 weeks now with no response from them. Why is that?
recommended I sign a fraudulent eligibility then they would step in and "help" with an iep
These people don’t help
Offered help as I would need it 🙂
Had a very large order on a Friday night when they were very busy. They handled it very promptly, everything was correct and fresh!
Answered many questions that I had made it simple to understand exactly what my rights are without having to call!
They are there to fight for your disability denials. Thanks Disability Rights.

D.R. Does it's best to assist anyone that reaches out. If the issues or subject isn't within the confines of the Agency's abilities or resources, have always been given clear advice & resources to contact. The web site is very clear, easily accessible & understandable. It also offers listings of other groups/agencies that are useful. The staff is knowledgeable & patient, even if D.R. FL. can't assist you. Also D.R.will swiftly mail out information or materials pertaining to your discussion.
A group worthy of being put on a "birthday fundraiser"  or similar occasions. The need for assistance is enormous, consider using D.R. FL. as resource & in return using D.R. FL or whatever chapter is closest to you as a fundraiser platform. TY to Disability Rights FL & D.R. National.

Pamela Ford was the advocate assigned to us for my child as it pertains to representation within Brevard County Schools. I had to request for her to fix the spelling on our paperwork 3 times. She did not respond to e-mails or phone calls within a timely matter (her responses took more than a week). It appeared that she was overworked and unable to maintain her schedule. This review pertains to how she represented my child and nothing towards the organization itself.
I am not a pet, I am a human being!

My son is disabled. Once I called Disability Rights of Florida for some advice. They are very proffesional. I have not been here though and neither did I post the pictures until now. I have no idea who is doing this with my information. But I too am on disability. I am 63years old. Please forgive me if this behavior of others has caused any harm. I too am trying to discover who and how this is being done. Sincerely Diana M. Bedingfield.

While my experiences were with the Tampa office, this office appears to be the one which heads all Florida operations. The executive director and board of directors are uncontactable, and the contacts of other lower level directors are difficult to impossible to find. Advocates will insist on phone contact, and in-person meetings as these leave no paper trail. All subjects of the meetings and phone calls are deniable at a later time, as there is no written record. All agreements made are null and void, and the advocates do not advocate on your behalf.
Good people

I’m very grateful for his help and highly recommend him to anyone needing a family law lawyer.

Brent was by our side the entire time and always communicated where they were in the process and what the next steps were to be. His guidance and honesty were truly appreciated.  We would highly recommend them as a firm and Mr. Berben as your lead attorney.  A big thanks to them!

It was an absolute pleasure working with The Corry Law firm . I was referred by a loved one whose case they previously handled and had great success . I didn't have to pay any money up front which was a huge relief; I greatly appreciate their willingness to fight for the settlement I deserved.

Corey Law firm was more then Helpful on getting me settled after a horrible accident. They went above and beyond and I would recommend them to anyone for injury lawyers.

I wanted to share the absolutely incredible experience I had with the Corry Law firm. I was in an automobile accident and a dear friend recommended The Corry Law Firm. Thanks Corry Law Firm..

If I could give 100 stars to Attorney Bill Corry and his staff, I would! I was involved in an horrible MVA around the holidays of 2023. He even visited me during my stay at the rehabilitation center during my recovery process. I can't say enough good things about my experience with this firm. I would refer anyone that I love or care about to Bill Corry, as I know he takes pride in all of his cases and you will feel like a true client and not just "a number". Im sure their office will handle your case with the same care and concern as they did mine.

Thanks again Attorney Corry! I admire your work ethic, and the excellent representation that you provided for me during such a dark time.

I must say that I absolutely love Mr. Corry. Never had a chance to meet him in person but he stayed in constant communication with myself as well as my daughter. I highly recommend him and his law firm.
My experience with the Corey law firm was amazing he was extremely honest and willing to help me get my case resolved in a timely manner

He genuinely cared about what was best for me and my family. If you’re looking for a lawyer who’s not only incredibly skilled but also truly on your side, I highly recommend Danny Phillips. I am so thankful for Danny and his firm. He represented me almost 5 years ago. I needed a copy of a filing and called after 5pm requesting the information or directions on requesting it. The next morning it was sitting in my email. Can't thank him enough for the fast response!

Danny’s expertise and dedication were evident throughout the entire process, providing me with confidence and peace of mind during a very challenging time. reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Hamilton thank you for your review. We are sorry you aren’t happy about the outcome of your case. Divorce is one of the most stressful times in a person’s life. We attempt to make the process as painless as possible for all of our clients. We prepare all documents, conduct all court hearings and provide a full explanation of the process to our clients along the way. In every divorce the law requires an assessment of the value of all marital assets/liabilities and distribute those assets/liabilities to the two parties in an equitable manner. The dividing and distribution of retirement accounts is part of the divorce process. If the parties have children under 18 years of age we will determine a parenting plan with a timesharing schedule and calculate child support according to the law of the state of Florida. In addition, if necessary the court will order alimony and attorney's fees. We have attempted to contact you a number of times to resolve any issue you may have, but we have not heard back from you. A lawyers duty to keep confidences has few exceptions and in an abundance of caution we do not feel that we should respond in a point by point fashion in this forum. Suffice it to say we do not believe that the post presents a fair and accurate picture of the events. Notwithstanding, we would like to speak with you regarding the specifics of your concerns and provide you with an explanation of the law and details of this matter. We invite you to call our office and ask Ms. Sandie to schedule a time for us to talk.

reviews.text: My civil case is still ongoing. It concerns a blatant statutory violation, and it will send shockwaves through the system. 5 years ago, I was denied by Mattox via email(I still have the email). The receptionist seems to have an attitude like she’s Elle Woods’ alter ego. It wasn’t a pleasant interaction. Not sure if she was in the weeds, having a bad day, or normally rude. She was on the phone with the best Pro Se attorney the U.S. Constitution has ever produced, and she was mean for no reason. Dotting T’s and crossing I’s, God as my witness since ‘89. I thought I was talking in the kindest way possible until she hit me with the mic check. I had to hang up. I took the phone call as an instant denial; so, denied 2 times. But after the phone call, I’m happy I got denied. If the receptionist is like that, I don’t want to experience how the attorney is.   Might be a good attorney but damn….  :(

For those of you considering this firm....ONE WORD...DON'T!!!
They don't answer phones or return phone calls, more importantly, they don't show up for appointments and then they don't contact you to reschedule.  They did this to me TWICE.  I had to send an email to the firm in order to get a return call.  When I did finally get to speak with one of their attorneys (Mr. Thomas Dickens) not only was he rude, but he was very defensive, stating "Im not gonna risk my license for your case".  This was before we even began to talk about the case, which I thought was very "Weird".  Where did that come from"?  Speaking with him briefly, he obviously knew nothing about my case.  I asked him if he read the very detailed statement that I sent, required as a part of their intake procedure.  He told me that he did not. (At least he was honest)  How can you give any type of legal advice if you don't know anything about the case at hand???  This guy just wanted to talk over me, and he rambled on for 15 minutes and did not say anything useful at all.  My first impression was "INCOMPETENT".   After listening to him say nothing for a bit, I finally told him I was wasting my time and ended the call.  I then sent an email asking for Ms. Mattox to call me regarding the very unprofessional call.  It is no surprise to me that this call will probably never be made.  CRICKETS once again.  For those of you considering this firm, please check other more experienced and competent attorneys first.  This one is the "Poster Firm" for fast talking, money mongers who care nothing about you and only about the bank deposit at the end of the day.

Update:  I have found that the small amount of information that I did glean from the conversation was incorrect and now my time limitations have passed.  Thank you Mr. Dickens and Ms, Mattox!

reviews.text:
My sister (Christina) is a client here and we HAVE to make a second review (she reviewed already) to rave about Katherine. From the beginning this firm has been incredible, easy to follow and without a doubt carries the presence you want by your side in a legal fight. HOWEVER, now we are in the actual nitty gritty of the case and I have gotten to know Katherine well. The wit and intelligence this outgoing, spit-fire woman brings is so refreshing. To see the vigor, care, knowledge, and kindness all tied into one lethal torpedo whose wisdom AND charisma allow her to confidently and swiftly respond to these opposing attorneys, is wonderful. Who needs coffee to energize you when instead I can listen to Katherine's responses to the opposing counsel, who try to dig frivolously into our lives and / or send us on wild goose chases requesting irrelevant documentation in attempts to harass, deter, and waste our time.

I cannot stress how good of a team this is. From the Paralegal, Shannon, all the way up; everyone I have spoken with is a wonderful representation of what you picture when looking for a Civil Attorney.

Since the firm has now chosen to respond, I’d like to offer a revised version of my original review to clarify and expand on my experience.

Maria Mattox and Jim Garrity have developed a reputation—at least in my view—for being among the least effective attorneys I’ve encountered. Their approach to legal representation seems to center around taking only the most clear-cut, low-effort cases. If your legal matter requires any significant time, energy, or commitment, it’s likely you’ll be turned away without much explanation.

It’s also clear that their interests are heavily weighted toward high-profile or potentially lucrative lawsuits—like the recent case Jim filed against Zaxby’s—rather than providing support to everyday clients who are seeking real help. That prioritization leaves those in genuine need feeling overlooked and unimportant.

The internal dynamics of the firm don’t inspire confidence either. Maria seems overly reliant on Jim, which raises concerns about her ability to act independently and make sound legal decisions—something critical in a profession that demands strong individual judgment. To make matters worse, the receptionist’s condescending attitude creates an unwelcoming, dismissive atmosphere from the start.

Communication is perhaps the most troubling part of my experience. It took six weeks—yes, six—for the firm to respond to my initial claim. When they finally did, it was simply to dismiss it, with no meaningful explanation or follow-up. In legal matters, where time and clarity are vital, this level of delay and disregard is simply unacceptable.

Ultimately, the entire experience left me feeling ignored and disrespected. It’s apparent that Mattox and Garrity prioritize cases with financial gain over those that require real advocacy. If you’re looking for legal professionals who will take your concerns seriously, communicate clearly, and actually advocate on your behalf, I strongly encourage you to look elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jett, we’re sorry to hear that you were disappointed with your experience. We are committed to treating every potential client with respect, and we take all feedback seriously. We understand how frustrating it can be when a case does not move forward, but these decisions are made based on legal merit and capacity—not on a lack of care or effort. Please contact our office directly at (850) 383-4800.

reviews.text:
I am a client with this firm currently in the process of a case, and they have been amazing. The intake was simple, I filled out the form and it had plenty of space to go into full detail and upload pictures. I got a call back from one of the attorneys 4 days later and he did a detailed review of what happened and then got me scheduled for my meeting with Mrs. Maddox. Every-time I have reached out they have been very kind and patient as I try to understand. They take the time to really break down the process which helps greatly.

As a family that comes from a law firm, most people don’t understand that a lot of it is a waiting game for the attorney. As we file, we then have to wait for them to submit their responses, before we can then move on to the next step. If they try to file certain motions the attorney then has to navigate a response to that which defers off the direct timeline prepped at the beginning of the case. The responses themselves take time before you can get back on the main path of the case AS WELL AS  (if you are suing the government) the government not wanting to just hand over incriminating evidence of themselves..it’s a tooth and nail fight..think cops saying “oh the video footage doesn’t exist” when it does. More examples are, letting the notice of intent timeframe pass, waiting if they file other motions, etc.

I can say with the utmost sincerity, I have never had anything but professional service and sincere care of what happened to me and to get justice. I laid out my want to push this as much as we can because what happened was extremely corrupt and I would be glad to go to trial if need be. They have supported that value of mine, but also helped me understand what happens if we do.

So again, knowing that cases, and Civil rights cases at that; take 2-5 years to complete because courts are slow. It is not the attorney, but rather it’s playing the waiting game with the courts. At this level this stuff takes serious time especially if you are going after the governing body or a large company. I recommended simply asking them to clarify on the phone if you don’t understand the courts, because once you understand that I don’t believe the one star reviews of lack of contact or communication would be there, however I am not taking away from ANYONES story, just want to stand by my experience thus far and encourage a little digging of what the court system and actual time frames look like. I think this could help people understand that when your attorney needs to speak with you or there is something due, have faith they will reach out and instruct you on next steps.

I highly recommend Marie Maddox and her firm if you want someone who is zealous in what they do, extremely knowledgeable of civil law, and someone who will be upfront with you of what the case looks like, while remaining compassionate.

reviews.text: My experience with this law firm was not the best. It started out rather smooth and then made a huge turn towards the end. My case was drawn out over five years when it could have been much less. Let me start by first addressing the customer service from most of the individuals who answer the phone. They have no phone etiquette when you call the office. It seems as if they are bothered or don't have the time to deal with anyone. I have encountered rudeness on several occasions which sets the tone for what this firm is all about. The people who answer the phones are not educated on general questions, you never get any help or answers and your always transferred so quickly or asked to leave a message. Secondly, the lack of communication this office has is diabolical. After sitting and waiting almost 4 years for any movement on my case, I begin to receive calls and emails from random people I never spoke to before requesting that I come to meetings with short notice. My time was not taken into consideration at all. I mean asking that someone attend a deposition or an online meeting one day before is unreasonable without advance notice or proper preparation. You will never speak to Ms. Mattox at all I gather that the firm is only named after her, I spoke to her one time on a 3 way call at the very end stage of my case for about five minutes. My case was passed over to multiple people throughout the entire process I was so confused and was never given any clarity as to who was actually handling my case until the very end. I was not given full and complete honesty about some information, I was told one thing and received the opposite. This firm has showed me that they are concerned with their own satisfaction instead of the clients. Without going into any specific details regarding my case I will say that I feel that the five years I wasted and waited for a resolution and outcome was totally unnecessary and those who handled my case know exactly what I am talking about. This review is more so for the potential clients of this firm. I would encourage you to ask as many questions as you can from the beginning and stay knowledgeable about your case to avoid what I went through.
reviews.ownerResponse: Gernea, we sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet the high standards of service we strive to provide. It is important to us that every client feels heard, respected, and valued when contacting our office. We apologize if there was any confusion regarding your case and the changes in staff handling it. At times, cases may require additional support from various team members to ensure they are handled with the highest level of care. We would like to discuss your experience further if you could please reach out to Marie directly at 850-556-3449. Thank you and we hope to speak with you soon.

You have done amazing things in my life I appreciate everything and all you're an amazing woman I hope you know that there is some pic. Of each one of my kids lol they are amazing and very good kids

I want to sincerely thank the team at Fasig Brooks, specifically attorneys Ryan Molaghan, Carrie Roane, Jimmy Fasig, and paralegal Jennifer Harness, who fought to get my medical bills covered after an uninsured and distracted driver slammed into my car at a stop light. Initially I did not hire Fasig Brooks, instead going directly through my insurance company because I carried uninsured motorist coverage. My own insurance company offered me an amount that was less than one tenth of what my medical treatment ultimately cost, despite me carrying a policy that was more than sufficient to cover all care. They were calling me 3 times a day heavily pressuring me to accept their tiny offer and sign a form to absolve them of any additional obligation. My insurance company was solely motivated to pay as little as possible, without any regard to my health.

Because of this, I hired Fasig Brooks. Without the hard work of the team at Fasig Brooks, I would have been stuck paying my five-figure medical bills out of pocket despite carrying insurance coverage for the exact situation that occurred. They are the protectors of normal people against the greed of the insurance companies, whose primary goal is to raise premiums and deny coverage. Again, I sincerely thank Carrie, Ryan, Jimmy, Jennifer, and all the other paralegals and legal assistants who helped me get my medical bills covered when the insurance company refused to honor their obligation.

They were VERY responsive at first & then once they gave up on my case I had to call/text repeatedly to get any responses; after months of waiting. It’s frustrating to find out I wasted that time waiting for nothing!! Now, months later - im filing my OWN civil suit, because they couldn’t be bothered with my case, I guess.

After my accident, I almost let my insurance handle everything and moved on. I’m glad I didn’t.

I’m in my late 20s — this was my first serious accident — and I didn’t realize how bad my injuries actually were until Kimmy and the team at Fasig Brooks got involved. They made sure I got the medical care I needed, took on the insurance company, and handled everything so I could focus on one thing: recovering.

This accident changed my life forever, I will never be the same. But because of Kimmy, I’m coming back stronger. I also appreciate that Fasig Brooks invests in my Tallahassee community. Kimmy sits on the board of our local women’s center — an organization that has touched many people in my life. Their care doesn’t stop with their clients.

If you’ve been in an accident and aren’t sure whether you need a lawyer — you do. Call Fasig Brooks.

Thank you again for trusting us and for taking the time to share your experience! And remember, you’re always part of our #ForeverFamily, so don’t hesitate to reach out if you ever need anything!

reviews.text:
I was in a bad car accident in 2021 and went with a different law firm in Tallahassee to represent me through the lawsuit and dealing with insurance companies, only for them to come up short. I felt like the didn’t take my case seriously nor really tried to do anything.

So after a very bad car accident in May 2023, involving my girlfriend and I. We went a different route and hired Fasig and Brooks to represent us through the process.

Carrie and her team were great from the start. Communication was great, they kept us very informed at what was going on, guided us through the medical process, and answered any questions we had. We received a few low ball settlement offers, but ultimately chose to move forward with litigation.

Then the case stalled. Didn’t really make any progress over the next year…

The car insurance company was playing hard to get…Ryan Molaghan stepped in, and they got, GOT.

Within 60 days of him getting involved, the case was resolved in our favor. Ryan and his paralegal assistant Brittney were absolutely amazing in keeping us informed and answering any questions we had. They fought HARD for us. They went above and beyond expectations. I cannot recommend them enough. Thank you guys for all of your hard work!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Will, thank you so much for sharing your experience. After everything you went through with your car accident, it was truly an honor to work with you and your girlfriend and help you through such a challenging time. We’re so glad you trusted us to step in and guide you through the process, and that you felt supported and informed along the way. Knowing that our work made a difference for you means so much to us. We wish you both continued healing and all the best moving forward. You’ll always be part of our #ForeverFamily!

- Team Carrie & Team Ryan
